iree_add_all_subdirs()

loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    source_info
  SRCS
    "source_info.c"
  DEPS
    loom::binding::c::loomc
)

loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    compile_text
  SRCS
    "compile_text.c"
  DEPS
    loom::binding::c::loomc
)

loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    link_modules
  SRCS
    "link_modules.c"
  DEPS
    loom::binding::c::loomc
)

    emit_spirv_offline
  SRCS
    "emit_spirv_offline.c"
  DEPS
    loom::binding::c::loomc
    loom::binding::c::loomc_target_spirv
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV)

    emit_spirv_vulkaninfo
  SRCS
    "emit_spirv_vulkaninfo.c"
  DEPS
    loom::binding::c::loomc
    loom::binding::c::loomc_target_spirv

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV AND LOOM_EXECUTE_SPIRV_VULKAN)

    emit_spirv_vulkan
  SRCS
    "emit_spirv_vulkan.c"
  DEPS

endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV)
loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    emit_spirv_iree_hal
  SRCS
    "emit_spirv_iree_hal.c"
  DEPS

    loom::binding::c::loomc_target_iree_hal
    loom::binding::c::loomc_target_spirv
    loom::binding::c::loomc_target_spirv_iree_hal
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV AND LOOM_EXECUTE_SPIRV_VULKAN)
loom_cc_test(
  NAME
    emit_spirv_vulkan_test
  SRCS
    "emit_spirv_vulkan.c"
  DEPS
    ${CMAKE_DL_LIBS}
    loom::binding::c::loomc
    loom::binding::c::loomc_target_spirv
    loom::binding::c::loomc_target_spirv_vulkan

    "driver=vulkan"
    "iree-run-requirement=loom.resource.vulkan_device"
    "loom-resource=vulkan-device"
  RESOURCE_GROUP
    loom-vulkan-tests
)
endif()
